name: Roshi Robert Kennedy
bio: Robert Kennedy is a Jesuit priest who also holds dharma transmission as a Zen teacher in the White Plum lineage of Taizan Maezumi Roshi. He is the founder of the Morning Star Zendo in Jersey City, New Jersey, and teaches at various centers. He holds a PhD in theology from the University of Ottawa. His work represents one of the most notable bridges between Christian contemplative practice and Zen Buddhism. He is the author of 'Zen Spirit, Christian Spirit.'
